name: Competitive Bidding
description: Open competitive bidding process per RA 9184 (Sec. 10)

name: Limited Source Bidding
description: Bidding limited to pre-selected list of suppliers (Sec. 49)

name: Unsolicited Offer with Bid Matching
description: Unsolicited proposals matched through competitive process

name: Direct Acquisition
description: Direct acquisition of goods or services

name: Repeat Order
description: Re-order from previous winning bidder within threshold (Sec. 51)

name: Small Value Procurement
description: Procurement not exceeding the SVP threshold (Sec. 53.9)

name: Direct Sales
description: Direct sales procurement from authorized dealers

name: Direct Procurement for Science, Technology and Innovation
description: Direct procurement for STI per RA 11293
